text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice El Condor Pasa sitting in the cafeteria
with a big grin on her face during lunch break.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey, Trainer. I just got a package from my
family!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My family's secret recipe hot sauce! One
spoonful's enough to get you soarin'!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It'll spice your meal up for an energy eruption!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's why I went ahead and got twice as much
food as usual.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No doubt I'll be winnin' back to back if I eat
plenty of this!
choice_data_list: Isn't it a waste to use it all up at once?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You think so? If it'll make me stronger, I don't
think there's any better way.
choice_data_list: Let's save it till the time is right.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... You mean, like, important races?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I see... So if I eat it all right before a big race, I'll
be able to run in peak condition!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Good thinking! That's why you're my trainer! To
think I almost ate it all in one sitting...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Agh! But I already ordered all this food!
choice_data_list: I can eat half of it.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, gracias! Okay, then let's hold on to this hot
sauce till the time is right...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And have lunch together! Food is extra delicious
when you share it with someone else!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sí! You don't need to tell me twice, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Time to eat up and get strong!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Curry, fried rice, omelet rice! I'll dye it all red and
turn it all into power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa drenches all the food she ordered
with hot sauce and makes quick work of it.
